svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(213, 245, 227), rgb(12, 40, 24)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(30, 132, 73), rgb(81, 168, 118));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 270px; height: 1px; padding-top: 176px; margin-left: 9px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e8449;
